Kris Cherevas, Esq. (619-685-1739; KCherevas@cozen.com) of Cozen O'Connor for Plaintiff Interested Underwriters Subscribing Policy 1230AP01428A18-1965 as Subrogees.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEGRYSE ELECTRIC, INC.'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part with leave to amend and overruled in part.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.
